title: JXLEDAYY 20M 200 LED Fairy Lights Plug in Christmas Lights Outdoor Globe String Lights Waterproof with Remote 8 Modes for Outside Garden Xmas Tree Party Indoor Bedroom Wedding Decorations Warm White
features: 💡【Super Bright 200 LED Fairy Lights Plug in】These fairy lights mains powered made of high-quality PVC material. Equipped with upgraded and latest LED chips, this globe fairy lights mains powered are much brighter than USB or battery powered lights and other traditional string lights. Powered by 31V low voltage, not only enery saving, but also avoids overheating problems caused by prolonged use

💡【20 M Long Fairy Lights & Widely Used】200 LED multicoloured fairy lights total length are 23m(75.46ft), each of lead wire length is 3m(9.8ft), and the lamp spacing 10cm (0.33ft), the diameter of the lamp bead is 0.04ft(12mm). This delicate set of LED fairy light is long enough to meet your large area indoor and outdoor decoration needs, ideal for bedroom, outdoor camping, garden, patios, parties, wedding, walls, fences, doors, stair posts, christmas trees, Easter, holidays decorations etc. It is also a perfect gift for friends and family

💡【IP44 Waterproof】Our outdoor fairy lights are IP44 waterproof, which is very perfect for outdoor use and can work normally. It is easy to create amazing night scenes. NOTE: The plug-in transformer is not waterproof, please keep from water, extra protection is required

💡【Remote Control & Memory Timer Function】These christmas string lights with 8 modes including combination, waves, sequential, slo glo, chasing, slow fade, twinkle, steady on. Each mode brings you a different experience. It also will remember the last mode you set when turn on again. Built in timer, 3 timer modes are available

💡【Package Include &Versatile】1x 200 LED Globe String Lights; 1x Remote Controller; 1x User Manual; With these warm white string lights, you can decorate the atmosphere well, such as decorating the garden, bedroom, patio, wedding, Christmas tree, party, festival, camping tent, etc
description: Product Description 200 LED Globe String Lights Plug in Christmas Decoration 20 M 200 LED globe fairy light, made of PVC plastic and not easily broken. With these warm white string lights, you can decorate the atmosphere well, such as decorating the garden, bedroom, patio, gazebo, wedding, Christmas tree, party, festival, camping tent, etc Timer Function Built in timer, the remote control mains powered berry lights with 3 timer modes are available, will 6 hours on and 18 hours off/8 hours on and 16 hours off/6 hours on 6 hours off and 3 hours on 9 hours off. 8 Lighting Modes The warm white globe fairy lights with 8 modes including combination, waves, sequential, slo glo, chasing, slow fade, twinkle, steady on to suit your mood. It also will remember the last mode you set when turn on again. 200 LED Fairy Lights Indoor Decoration This ball fairy lights are brighter than traditional string lights with qualified LED chips. Built in timer, the remote control mains powered berry lights with 3 timer modes are available, will 6 hours on and 18 hours off/8 hours on and 16 hours off/6 hours on 6 hours off and 3 hours on 9 hours off. IP44 Waterproof The outdoor globe string lights is waterproof. LED berry lights can be used both indoor and outdoor. 4 Levels Brightness Dimmable Our plug in fairy lights also have 4 level of brightness.
